title: festuca ovina f. trachyphylla
intro: Festuca ovina f. trachyphylla, also known as sheep's fescue, is a species of flowering plant in the grass family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, particularly in Europe and Asia, for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Festuca ovina f. trachyphylla include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, and are often used to support overall health and well-being.
